<!-- ^^^ PR Title must follow the Conventional Commit format and becomes the merge commit summary:
  <type>(<scope>): <short summary>
Types: feat|fix|chore|docs|test|refactor
Scope (area of the codebase), e.g., uds|transport|core|macros|runner|ci|etc.
-->

## Commit Message Details

<!-- Describe "what" you did and "why" in a way that is useful for the historical record.
     This sections get appended to the final commit message as the message body.
     Can be omitted if the title is sufficient. -->

## Issue URL

Closes #<issue ID>

## Testing

<!-- List manual and automated tests performed to ensure correctness, e.g.,
- [ ] Unit tests added/updated
- [ ] Tested on target hardware with bench.yml
- [ ] HIL tests pass on model-j bench
-->
